null_expectations.note: Expected exceedance fractions if the climate matched the 1991-2020 baseline. Counts above these are the anomaly signal; counts near them are the base rate.

validation.note: Warm-for-a-hill-station day; searched, no public coverage found.
Weather.com's dated 7 Oct 2023 forecast warned of isolated heavy-to-very-heavy rain (64.5–115.5mm) over Assam and Meghalaya for 7–8 Oct from a decaying low, matching the flag's region and date.
